title: Krasnoyarsk, Krasnoyarsk Krai — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Krasnoyarsk, Krasnoyarsk Krai: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Krasnoyarsk is a city in Krasnoyarsk Krai with a population of 1,090,000. A major Siberian city on the Yenisei River, a center of hydroelectric power and aluminum production, surrounded by stunning nature.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
